company: Research And Development Easwari Engineering College
description: Worked for Illumine as a backend developer, using Gemma LLM and Tesseract OCR to detect customer addresses from large mixed-format documents including PDFs with text, images, and tables, as well as image-only files.

Worked as a Django Developer on the NexDox platform, building features using Django, FastAPI integration, and PostgreSQL/SQL Server. Gained hands-on experience with function-based views, API development, and foundational Google Cloud services.
